scripts.e2e:prepare: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const { chromium } = require('@playwright/test'); let executable = ''; try { executable = chromium.executablePath(); } catch (error) {} if (!executable || !fs.existsSync(executable)) { execSync('npx playwright install chromium', { stdio: 'inherit' }); }"
scripts.e2e:ai: npm run e2e:prepare && node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const runner = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npx.cmd' : 'npx'; const env = { ...process.env, RUN_AI_VISION_E2E: '1' }; const result = spawnSync(runner, ['playwright', 'test', 'e2e/ai_onboarding.spec.ts'], { stdio: 'inherit', env }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
